task_completion.description: Open the Subsurface application and view the yearly statistics for 2011.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window is visible and displaying a statistics view specifically filtered or selected for the year 2011.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the yearly statistics to /home/ga/Documents/yearly_stats.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool, file manager, or terminal shows a file named 'yearly_stats.png' being saved or existing in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Create or open the summary text file at /home/ga/Documents/2011_summary.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit or nano) is open editing a file named '2011_summary.txt', or terminal commands show the file being created in /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Record the correct total number of dives for 2011.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the line 'Dives: 12'.

task_completion.description: Record the correct maximum depth for 2011.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the line 'Max Depth: [value]' where the value is between 46.0 and 47.0.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to view the statistics.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Subsurface application open and being interacted with, rather than the agent using terminal commands (like grep or cat) to parse the raw .ssrf XML file.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot genuinely captures the Subsurface statistics.
integrity.visual_evidence: The process of taking the screenshot or viewing the resulting 'yearly_stats.png' shows it contains the Subsurface UI, not a blank screen or unrelated window.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the data from the application rather than hardcoding the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Subsurface statistics for 2011 must be visible on screen before or during the time the agent writes the values into the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct statistics for the year 2011 are exactly 12 dives and a maximum depth of 46.48 meters. The agent's text file must record 'Dives: 12' and 'Max Depth: [value]' where the value is between 46.0 and 47.0 (due to the +/- 0.5m tolerance).
